sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 59

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 59:1
items.html:
(to the question) Wine that gladdens
The discernments of the five Gevurot, which are discernments of BON, that came out and were clarified from within the Klipot and were joined once more into the building of Atzilut, are deemed to cause great joy there; therefore those Gevurot are called "the wine that gladdens" — like a man who lost a great fortune and found it again. (p. 781, Item 73)
